message:
feat: add native SQLite sync inbox queries and refactor CLI direct-check path

sync.rs: add fetch_inbox_native_sqlite_by_ids() and related sync query
functions that bypass the frankensqlite async/runtime path for inbox
reads. Uses native rusqlite for operational mailbox reads and CLI
fallback paths. Add MAX_SYNC_IN_CLAUSE_ITEMS guard.

cli/lib.rs: refactor check_inbox_direct to use the new native sync
queries instead of inline SQL, removing sqlmodel_core::Value import
and simplifying the query logic.

queries.rs: remove inbox query functions migrated to sync.rs.
messaging.rs: minor formatting fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,5 +47,8 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 nix = { workspace = true, features = ["signal", "process"] }
 
+[target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
+plist = "1.8.0"
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 similar.workspace = true
